title: Physalastrum flavescens
intro: Physalastrum flavescens, also known as Yellow Earthball, is a type of fungus that belongs to the family Physalacriaceae. This plant has been found to have several health benefits, including antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. The bioactive constituents of Physalastrum flavescens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and polysaccharides, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Physalastrum flavescens is often used to make decoctions and infusions, as well as being incorporated into salves and topical creams to aid in wound healing and skin infections.
